title: Nullified Lights
body:
This tweaks/changes the look of lanterns and torches. The main feature of this pack requires the Polytone mod for Fabric (if in 1.21). However, for 1.21.4+, vanilla will work just fine. I'm no longer updating the Polytone version of this pack.
If you have the Polytone mod, or a version at or past 1.21.4, torches, soul torches, redstone torches, and lanterns will have an item model when dropped, in your inventory, or in an item frame.

If models are bugged, join the discord linked somewhere on the modrinth page and let me know, so I can get a work on fixes.
